div.t-esc: ''.join([part[0] for part in user.name.split() if part][:2]).upper()

div.style: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 0.5rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;

div.p: Manage system vehicle profiles and statuses

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;

div.p: Track licenses, safety compliance, and assignments
Monitor delivery runs, cargo limits, and ETAs

t.t-foreach: drivers_list.filtered(lambda d: d.status == 'available' and d.safety_status == 'available' and not d.is_expired)

div.style: display: none; background-color: #fef2f2; border: 1px solid #fee2e2; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.75rem; color: #b91c1c; font-size: 0.8125rem;
display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; max-height: 600px; overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 0.25rem;
border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1.25rem; background-color: #f8fafc; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; position: relative;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
display: flex; gap: 1rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 500;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.25rem 0;

div.t-attf-style: flex: 1; text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid #{'#3b82f6' if trip.status in ['draft', 'dispatched', 'completed'] else '#e2e8f0'}; padding-bottom: 3px; color: #{'#3b82f6' if trip.status == 'draft' else '#334155'};

flex: 1; text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid #{'#06b6d4' if trip.status in ['dispatched', 'completed'] else '#e2e8f0'}; padding-bottom: 3px; color: #{'#06b6d4' if trip.status == 'dispatched' else '#334155' if trip.status == 'completed' else '#94a3b8'};

div.style: flex: 1; text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid #ef4444; padding-bottom: 3px; color: #ef4444;

div.t-attf-style: flex: 1; text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid #{'#10b981' if trip.status == 'completed' else '#e2e8f0'}; padding-bottom: 3px; color: #{'#10b981' if trip.status == 'completed' else '#94a3b8'};

div.style: margin-top: 0.5rem; background-color: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.625rem; font-size: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem;
font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 0.7rem;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-top: 0.25rem;
display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border-color); padding-top: 0.5rem;

div.p: Track repairs, schedules, and maintenance costs
Log refueling entries and miscellaneous operations costs
Track efficiency ratios, ROI computations, and financial performance

div.style: height: auto; padding: 1.5rem; gap: 0.5rem; border-top: 4px solid #10b981;
div.span: Sum of Fuel Logs + Maintenance Cost

div.style: height: auto; padding: 1.5rem; gap: 0.5rem; border-top: 4px solid #3b82f6;
height: auto; padding: 1.5rem; gap: 0.5rem; border-top: 4px solid #f59e0b;
display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
text-align: center; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; width: 180px; background-color: #f8fafc;
text-align: center; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; width: 180px; background-color: #f8fafc;
text-align: center; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; width: 180px; background-color: #f8fafc;

div.p: Configure system parameters and view user role-based permissions matrix

div.style: padding: 1.5rem 0 0 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;
padding: 1.5rem 0 0 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;
padding: 1.5rem 0 0 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;
display: none; background-color: #fef2f2; border: 1px solid #fee2e2; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.75rem; color: #b91c1c; font-size: 0.8125rem;

div.div: Final odometer reading must be greater than or equal to current odometer.
